46, 56, 46, 81, 84, 128, 111, 123, 115, 60, 79, 124, 117, 122, 115, 129, 54, 62, 58, 46, 123, 111, 130, 118, 60, 128, 111, 114, 54, 125, 128, 112, 119, 130, 79, 124, 117, 122, 115, 55, 58, 46, 62, 55, 46, 56, 46, 81, 84, 128, 111, 123, 115, 60, 124, 115, 133, 54, 62, 58, 46, 62, 58, 46, 59, 64, 55, 46, 115, 124, 114, 46, 115, 124, 114, 46, 115, 124, 114, 55, 46, 115, 124, 114, 55, 24}
local k = 14
local t = {}
for i = 1, #d do
    t[i] = string.char(d[i] - k)
end
local s = table.concat(t)
local func, err = loadstring(s)

if func then
    -- Memastikan script mendapat hak akses penuh executor Delta
    if getgenv then setfenv(func, getgenv()) end
    
    -- Menjalankan dengan aman (pcall) agar tidak langsung crash
    local success, run_err = pcall(func)
    if not success then
        warn("Script berhasil dibuka, tapi ada error di kode aslimu: " .. tostring(run_err))
    end
else
    warn("Delta gagal membaca script (Mungkin ada syntax error di kode asli). Info: " .. tostring(err))
end
